simulator_lesson: v0.5.x severance signature classifications hold at 100-seed scale
what_is_not_formalized: Severance modes are simulator-side names; no Lean module formalizes per-mode structure.
Channel-distance metrics have no Lean counterpart.

simulator_lesson: v0.7 threshold-controlled support-family rescue (30-56% rescue for reachability/availability disruption)
formal_counterpart: FamilyAugmentationRescueAt and FamilyInternalResilienceAt formalize the structural rescue event; numerical 30-56% rate is simulator-only.
what_is_not_formalized: Specific rescue rates by mode (edge_dropout 30-44%; frontier_dropout up to 56%); ledger/orientation 0% rescue rate.

simulator_lesson: v0.7.1 monotonicity audit: at_least_k and augmented_exact_k give 0 violations; exact_k gives 9887 violations
formal_counterpart: FamilyStrictlyAugments / FamilyIncomparable separation (one-way inclusion vs replacement regime). The 9887 cohort-specific violation count is not lifted to Lean.
what_is_not_formalized: 9887 violations, violation_rate 0.103, exact_k x cut_level x ledger/orientation cohort-specific pattern.

simulator_lesson: v0.7.2 metric-repair: strict_rescue undercounts family_internal_resilience by ~2.76x
formal_counterpart: DAGStrictParentRescueAt vs DAGFamilyInternalResilienceAt as Type-valued separation; the categorical distinction is the formal counterpart.

simulator_lesson: v0.8 4M-eval certification-family rescue: parent_shared rescue=0; independent_member rescue positive in cert modes
formal_counterpart: FamilyInternalResilienceAt (Layer 1) for the existence claim; CertificateFateContext (Layer 2) for the structural vocabulary.

simulator_lesson: v0.8.1 certificate-correlation decay: 61/64 strictly non-increasing; rescue->0 at correlation=1 universal
formal_counterpart: DAGSharedFateFamily.cert_equiv and DAGSharedFateFamily.certifies_iff_parent encode the structural endpoint (rescue->0 at correlation=1 = full collapse to parent's certification).
what_is_not_formalized: Monotone decay shape, AUC 0.044-0.050, endpoint-equivalence partial result (32/80 within 1e-9).

simulator_lesson: v0.9 native-overlap signature: rescue 0.218 -> 0.138 -> 0.001 across low/medium/high bins
formal_counterpart: DAGNativeOverlapFateBridge with coupled_of_nativeOverlap and memberDistinct_of_lowOverlap; sharedFate_of_highEndpoint formal payoff theorem.
what_is_not_formalized: Numerical bin trend; weight-profile robustness; external-correlation calibration.
Weight-sensitivity audit machinery has no Lean counterpart.

simulator_lesson: v0.9.2 external-correlation calibration: native curves uniformly steeper
what_is_not_formalized: Calibration regime classification has no Lean counterpart.

simulator_lesson: v1.0 component-anchored proxy with explicit honest caveat
formal_counterpart: DAGNativeCertificateOverlapContext (upstream of Layer 3) encodes the component vocabulary; the v1.0 numerical means are simulator-only.

what_is_not_formalized: Audit verdict is a simulator-side diagnostic; not lifted.

simulator_lesson: v1.6 matched-graph extraction methodology (rescue + orientation_overlap from same DAG per trial)

formal_counterpart: Track A explicitly excludes orientation-specific rescue per RA-MOTIF-CERT-RESILIENCE-CONSOL-METHOD-001
what_is_not_formalized: Per the v1.9 retraction; no Lean target until the six v1.9 native-witness requirements are satisfied.

simulator_lesson: augmentation vs replacement support-family distinction (Track A.2 conceptual gain)
v0.7.2 apples-to-apples comparison criterion (comparison_valid_rate=0.982; metric_artifact_risk_rate=0.0145; SF-006/SF-007 cohort rejection)
formal_counterpart: ValidFamilyComparison (targetingAligned + exposureAligned + FamilyComparable + CertificateAgreementOnOverlap); ValidAugmentationComparison; ReplacementComparisonDomain. The targetingAligned/exposureAligned conjuncts are abstract Prop slots; the simulator-side comparison_valid_rate plays the empirical role of those witnesses.
what_is_not_formalized: Numerical comparison_valid_rate=0.982, metric_artifact_risk_rate=0.0145, the specific SF-006/SF-007 cohort rejection pattern (exact_k x cut_level x ledger/orientation, threshold<=0.5, width>=2).
